## Description

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

## Safety Checklist

Before submitting, confirm ALL of the following:

- [ ] **No API keys, tokens, secrets, or credentials** anywhere in the diff
- [ ] **No internal URLs** (staging servers, admin endpoints, internal dashboards)
- [ ] **No customer data or PII** (emails, names, transaction IDs, database records)
- [ ] **No infrastructure details** (server IPs, database schemas, internal service names, file system paths)
- [ ] **No private business logic** from the bippsi.com codebase (only external-facing protocol behavior)
- [ ] **No database table or column names** from the private application
- [ ] **No internal function names or PHP class names** from the private codebase
- [ ] **Reference implementations are self-contained** (no imports from private packages)
- [ ] **CHANGELOG.md updated** if spec text was modified

## Type of Change

- [ ] Spec text change (requires CC BY 4.0 license header)
- [ ] Reference implementation (requires MIT license header)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] New specification

## Additional Context

Any additional information reviewers should know.
